_meta.purpose: Live state of the World Cup 2026 once it starts. Empty until kickoff 2026-06-11. Populated by scripts/fetch-results.ts + fetch-cards.ts running on GH Action cron. Engine reads this and short-circuits matches that already happened, then re-runs Monte Carlo on the remaining undecided ones.

schema.results.group: Keyed by 'LETTER:pairIdx' (e.g. 'A:0'..'L:5'). pairIdx is the GROUP_PAIRS order from src/lib/sim/group.ts.
schema.results entry: { stage, home, away, gh, ga, kickoff_iso, status: 'completed'|'scheduled', went_to_et?: bool, went_to_pk?: bool, pk_winner?: team_id }
schema.live_suspensions: Players banned for the team's next match (yellow accumulation, red, federation). Applied as absence on top of injuries in absences.json.
schema.cards: Per-match card log. Yellow/red accumulation is computed downstream by suspensions logic.
